data.note: filterOutcome = what OsmPlaceFilter.filter() returns for the extracted tags. REJECTED means the reclassifier cannot fix this record. A known type (FOOD/ATTRACTION/etc.) means the reclassifier SHOULD have fixed it.
data.reclassifierNote: changed = reclassifier successfully modified placeTypeDraft. notChanged = reclassifier ran but did not change type (tags known but type unchanged). filterRejected = OsmPlaceFilter returned REJECTED for the tags. noRawPayload = raw_payload column was null. emptyTags = raw_payload had no rawTags/tags key. skipped = other reason.
